subject: Need help with stale account cleanup — query results attached
description:
Hi IAM team,

I ran this query:

SELECT u.user_id, u.display_name, u.last_login,
       DATEDIFF(day, u.last_login, GETDATE()) AS days_inactive
FROM dbo.Users u
WHERE u.account_status = 'active'
    AND u.last_login < DATEADD(month, -3, GETDATE())
ORDER BY u.last_login ASC;

/* 847 rows returned */

Per SEC-POL-007, accounts inactive 90+ days should be disabled. Can you run the bulk disable process?
